microsoft_ft: Served as the bridge between Azure customers and engineering, debugging integrations and resolving adoption blockers for enterprise accounts (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to drive $14M+ in business impact across 45+ resilience drills.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service tooling that reduced operational toil by 30% and gave developers a smoother, more reliable path to validate their workloads.

Built an internal AI agent and SDK-style automation that restructured planning workflows, cutting cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% while surfacing recurring customer pain points for engineering.

Pioneered Azure’s first proactive resilience testing capability, shipping a rack-level drill program in 4 months at a 94% recovery rate that surfaced critical hardware defects and accelerated reliable customer adoption.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract and feeding field learnings back into the product.
microsoft_2023: Drove developer adoption of AI-driven code generation by running hands-on demos and training across 14 teams, unblocking integration friction and saving 37 engineering hours monthly.
Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by running 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, translating recurring patterns into prioritized feature direction.
Migrated documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting developer lookup time by 83% and improving self-service experience.
microsoft_2022: Generated $3M in accelerated revenue and launched regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework rooted in real operational pain.
Drove discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region, building a roadmap to automate the critical paths that blocked faster launches.
Engineered a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target high-impact automation gaps and prioritize support.
amazon_robotics: Achieved zero downtime across a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining a legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations to de-risk rollout.
Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25%.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets, stabilizing the developer intake process.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings 26% by rebuilding the CRM-driven scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals end to end.
Cut Customer Acquisition Cost 13% and lifted conversions 2.7% via a digital-first go-to-market strategy and optimized web presence.
Improved leadership pricing models by analyzing 1,000+ project records to identify and seal margin leaks.

tailoring_notes: Tightened all bullets to fit one page; dropped weakest bullets per role within caps.
Reframed FT role around customer-facing debugging + bridge between customers and engineering to mirror Customer Engineer JD.
Surfaced SDKs, prototypes/POCs, developer experience, and AI/LLM tooling to match core responsibilities.
Led with action verbs and JD vocabulary (adoption, integrations, field learnings, developer experience).
